intro: Chaerefolium alpestre, also known as Alpine Angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Chaerefolium alpestre include essential oils, flavonoids, and coumarins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Alpine Angelica is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
